faqs.question: How do I know if I have a drain fly infestation in my Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies are small, fuzzy moths that hover around sinks, showers, and drains. You may notice them on bathroom walls or near kitchen drains, especially in the evening. If you see multiple flies congregating near drains or notice larvae in sink overflows, you likely have an infestation requiring professional treatment.

faqs.question: What does drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection to identify breeding sites, mechanical cleaning of drains to remove organic buildup, application of bio-enzymatic treatments to eliminate larvae, and targeted insecticide application when necessary. We also provide recommendations to prevent future infestations and follow-up service if needed.

faqs.question: How long does it take to eliminate drain flies in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly infestations can be controlled within 1-2 weeks with proper treatment. You'll notice a significant reduction in adult flies within 2-3 days, but complete elimination requires breaking the breeding cycle. Our technicians ensure all larvae and organic material are removed from drains to prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $350 to $550?
faqs.answer: The cost depends on the severity of the infestation, number of drains affected, property size, and accessibility of plumbing fixtures. A single bathroom treatment starts at $350, while whole-house treatments or commercial properties with multiple problem areas may reach $550. We provide free estimates after inspection of your Floral Park property.
